tag.v: Bicycles travelling east from the CBD use a dedicated crossing signal rather than traffic signals, so this is different from the westbound bicycle signal
Bicycles travelling west to the CBD use the roadway traffic signals, not a pedestrian crossing signal or button, so this point should not be changed to a pedestrian crossing with traffic signals
Motor vehicle access is to be revoked during events at One New Zealand Stadium, with pedestrian and cycle access retained during events
WEST via one way system;Christchurch Hospital
Motor vehicle access is to be revoked during events at One New Zealand Stadium, with pedestrian and cycle access retained during events
WEST via one way system;Christchurch Hospital
Motor vehicle access is to be revoked during events at One New Zealand Stadium, with pedestrian and cycle access retained during events
Changes have been made to Rolleston Avenue and Park Terrace to improve safety for pedestrians, cyclists and visitors while the redevelopment of the Canterbury Museum is underway.
Changes have been made to Rolleston Avenue and Park Terrace to improve safety for pedestrians, cyclists and visitors while the redevelopment of the Canterbury Museum is underway.
Motor vehicle access is to be revoked during events at One New Zealand Stadium, with pedestrian and cycle access retained during events
